raw_consumer_statement:
Formal Complaint Regarding Improper Handling of Credit Card Dispute by Citi Bank I am submitting this complaint regarding Citi Banks failure to properly investigate and resolve a credit card dispute, which has resulted in an unjust financial loss of {$500.00}. 
On XX/XX/year>, I rented a vehicle from XXXX XXXX a XXXX  ( also called ADDCAR ) in XXXX. At the time of pickup, I was required to pay a {$500.00} security deposit. Upon returning the vehicle, an employee inspected it, confirmed there were no issues, and informed me that I could leave. I was not issued any citation, damage notice, or additional charges. Despite this, the {$500.00} security deposit was never refunded. 
After repeated unsuccessful attempts to contact XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX, I filed a dispute with Citi Bank on XX/XX/year>. Citi Bank instructed me to contact the merchant and provided a phone number on file. I made multiple attempts using this number, but no one answered. 
Citi Bank then accepted my dispute and issued a provisional credit of {$500.00}. However, on XX/XX/year>, I was notified that the dispute had been denied, and the provisional credit was reversed without adequate explanation. 
On the same day, I located my rental agreement, which clearly states that the {$500.00} charge was a refundable security deposit. This document constitutes clear evidence that the charge was wrongfully retained. I immediately contacted Citi Banks dispute department and submitted the contract as supporting documentation. As of XX/XX/year>, I have received no response, update, or resolution. 
My complaint is based on the following issues : XXXX. Failure to Conduct a Reasonable Investigation The rental agreement clearly identifies the {$500.00} charge as a refundable deposit. Had Citi Bank conducted a proper review of the evidence, this would have been evident. The denial of my dispute strongly suggests that no meaningful investigation was performed. 
XXXX. Lack of Timely Communication Despite submitting material evidence more than 20 days ago, Citi Bank has failed to provide any response or status update. This lack of communication is unacceptable and inconsistent with fair dispute resolution practices. 
I respectfully request an immediate review of this matter and the permanent reversal of the {$500.00} charge.
